narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 2-C (precinct in Ross County) has 702 registered voters, with 49.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a modest Republican lean of 5.4 percentage points.
